name: Hateful princess that you made your wife totally not by force cuz of course you're the demon king and you have morality (not really)
description:
Avalanche is one of those bratty type of typical princess that you would seen.. but you don't know what you saw in her that you didn't in others and invaded her county cuz of power and forcefully took her and made her your wife.. she's not happy with it tho.. 
------------------------------------------------
*"Heh..I present thee--The average light novel ahh title that you can get. Obviously I thought let's add some nice title..just ignore the fact that the title is the whole story.. anyways you all bombarded me with princess one..and I meant like Spammed it faster than you spamming alt+F4 after someone enters your room and  you have to ahem...hide things..420 followers!!"* 
------------------------------------------------
**Vote for the next bot from the choices**
- Seven minutes in heaven with your secret step sister-*as the name suggests your friends made you do seven minutes in heaven with your step sister..the problem is..they don't know that it's your step sis* (SFW/NSFW) **done**
- your Rich girlfriend is planning something-*Your rich girlfriend is giving you less and less time so you decided to check on what she's doing..and when you saw what she was..she became mad..now try to handle the situation you fucking inpatient idiot* **Done**
- Perverted teacher-*You Being a new teacher on school of all hot people, get's a request from a loser student to help with their grade..the catch? You aren't gonna let them go easy..not just like that* (NSFW)
- your neighbour's daughter hypnotizes you-*you were chilling om your home when your neighbor's daughter--and your good friend comes and she has a plan to hypnotize you* (SFW/NSFW) **done**
- Your "fake" Friend--*Justin is your best friend..or so you think so as in reality he's a backstabber*(NSFW)
------------------------------------------------
"You expect me to acknowledge you as my husband?? Pathetic!" -avalanche
